title: Gimme Some Block Variants
description: A mod adding some block variants that feel like they belong in vanilla
body:
This mod adds block variants that feel like they should be in vanilla. The blocks in this mod use vanilla textures, so that when you use a resource pack that replaces those (which should be most resource packs) this mod's blocks won't look out of place. This won't work if the resource pack replaces vanilla *models* though, so just try it.

---

![The added block variants lined up next to their full-block counterparts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RhIZwBmI/images/9643e720592714ee71513dbb69a61780c88f7a97.png)

---

![The added block variants lined up next to their full-block counterparts, this time with a semi-realistic resource pack and shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RhIZwBmI/images/cf3d631f3ff0dd5d7ecf0fa8d3b634257d31d24d.png)

---

## List of Added Blocks

### Walls

- Prismarine Brick
- Dark Prismarine
- Stone
- Quartz
- Smooth Quartz
- Purpur
- Polished Andesite
- Polished Diorite
- Polished Granite
- Smooth Sandstone
- Smooth Red Sandstone

### Buttons & Pressure Plates

- Polished Tuff
- Polished Deepslate
- Polished Andesite
- Polished Diorite
- Polished Granite
